title: bus.tengine.visual.regression v1
description: When: A SSIM comparison between a baseline screenshot and a current screenshot detects a regression. Source: /tengine. Emitted by the WT 558 ring drain; consumers trigger alerts or halt a pipeline when regression is detected.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

baseline_path.description: Absolute filesystem path to the baseline (reference) screenshot PNG.

current_path.description: Absolute filesystem path to the current screenshot PNG being compared.

ssim.description: Structural Similarity Index score between baseline and current; 1.0 means identical, 0 means completely different.

luminance_delta.description: Absolute difference in mean luminance between baseline and current; larger values indicate more severe visual change.

classification.description: Human-readable regression class: 'dark_patch' (unexpected dark region), 'contrast_spike' (sharp contrast change), 'nan' (rendering produced NaN values), 'clamp' (values were clamped), 'normal' (SSIM below threshold but no specific anomaly detected).
